channel.title: Testing on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Testing on emsenn.net

item.title: Testing Harness
item.description:
Testing Harness Architecture

Provides automated CI/CD testing for relational modules.

Dependencies

  • Testing Harness Simulation: test definitions, execution, assertion logic.
  • STLC Simulation: to compile/generate test traces.
  • Scheduling Simulation: to run tests deterministically (or in parallel when safe).
  • Measurement Fabric Simulation: captures test telemetry (duration, failure rates) across the fabric.
  • Topology Integration Simulation: constrains where tests execute (per stratum/region) and ensures coverage of all placements.
  • Traceability & Knowledge Service: links each test case/run to the acts/specs it justifies.

Components

  1. Test Repository.
    Stores test cases (trace fragments + expectations) under version control.
